*   xf = ( (1 - eta_c) * phi ) / ( 85.68 + phi + 5 * eta_c * phi )
*   xo = ( 18 * (1 - eta_c * phi) ) / ( 85.68 + phi + 5 * eta_c * phi )

    | Diffuser Type            | Merits                                                         | Drawbacks                                                                                                                                      |

    | Aerodynamic or faired    | Low pressure loss                                              | Relatively long Performance susceptible to thermal distortion and manufacturing tolerances Performance and stability sensitive to variations in inlet velocity profile |

    | Vortex-controlled        | High performance Short length Low pressure loss                | Requires minimum of 4% air bleed Design procedures not fully established                                                                   |
    | Hybrid                   | High performance Short length Low pressure loss Low bleed air requirement | Design procedures not fully established Bleed air pressure too low for turbine cooling                                                                       |
    | Hybrid with prediffuser | High performance Low pressure loss Low bleed air requirement High bleed air pressure | Needs extra length                         |
